title: Bosch Professional 25-Piece PointTeQ HSS Twist Drill Bit Set (for Metal, ProBox, Drill Driver Accessories)
seller_info_text: Sold by Amazon Resale and Fulfilled by Amazon.
features: The Professional 25pc. HSS PointTeQ ProBox Metal Drill Bit Set from Bosch - fast drilling in metal due to PointTeQ tip design
Increased drilling rate generates less heat and wear
Cylindrical shank compatible with three-jaw drill chucks
Ideal for drilling holes into alloyed and unalloyed steel, non-ferrous metals, plastics and wood
Scope of delivery: 25 x Bosch Professional HSS PointTeQ Twist Drill Bits for Steel - Ø 1/1.5/2/2.5/3/3.5/4/4.5/5/5.5/6/6.5/7/7.5/8/8.5/9/9.5/10/10.5/11/11.5/12/12.5/13 mm
